_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Continuity management involves clearly defining processes and remediation plans to ensure the availability of systems and services in the event of unplanned downtime.
reference_document_element_description: Manage the consent lifecycle across organizational systems, including consent collection configuration, preference storage, withdrawal processing, re-consent campaigns, and audit record maintenance.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-T-013 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-T-011 (DQ, cosine: 0.447), RC-T-005 (RC, cosine: 0.432).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.8/10 (raw 0.378). Shared vocabulary: [systems]. DDaT-only terms [availability, clearly, continuity, defining, downtime, ensure] vs WIDAI-only terms [across, audit, campaigns, collection, configuration, consent] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.863 (P=0.871, R=0.855). Balanced P/R — the 23-word DDaT element and 21-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.8%). "Continuity management involves clearly defining processes and remediation plans" and "Manage the consent lifecycle across organizational systems, including consent co" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.477 > STS 0.378 (gap +0.099). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [systems] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.1%. Shared tokens: [systems]. DDaT-only: [availability, clearly, continuity, defining, downtime, ensure]. WIDAI-only: [across, audit, campaigns, collection, configuration, consent].
